content:
I need to analyze the code to identify which files/classes belong to the `cli` package, then count relations where both source and target are within that package.

Looking at the code provided, I can identify the packages:
- `mermaid` package: auto-repair, comment-generator, cpp-package-flowchart-generator, diagram-generator, external-dependencies, generator utilities, grouper, index, post-process-svg, progress, render-worker-pool, render-worker, renderer, test-coverage-renderer, ts-module-graph-renderer, types, validation-pipeline, validators
- `parser` package: archjson-aggregator, base-extractor, class-extractor, enum-extractor, errors, function-extractor, index, interface-extractor, metrics-calculator, parallel-parser, parse-cache, relation-extractor, typescript-parser

There is no `cli` package represented in the code above. None of the files shown are from a `cli` package — they're all from parser/extractor or mermaid diagram generation modules.
